title: Trump administration's AI safety chief Chris Fall resigns after three months
watch: Announcement of a permanent CAISI director
Any on-the-record reason for Fall's departure, or confirmation/denial of the anonymous 'stopgap' characterization
cycle_2026-07-21_night_c5_note: Carried over from cycle 4's report as a strong flagged candidate (dedup-check clean then, re-confirmed clean this cycle). Verified directly in this session rather than via separate sub-agent dispatch to fit a hard ~20-minute cycle window. Cleared the wire-exclusivity independence bar: TechCrunch and CNBC (both Tier 2 registered) each report CAISI confirming the resignation directly to their own reporters, not merely relaying Axios's original scoop. The 'stopgap appointment' quote is Axios-only, labeled single-source and attributed. No dispute or denial found on an explicit adversarial search. Style gates: EN pass / TR pass.
